ReferenceData.String: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="ISO-8859-1"?> <!DOCTYPE ForceField.dtd PUBLIC "ForceField.dtd" "ForceField.dtd"> <ForceField> <AtomTypes> <Type name="ow_1" class="ow_b" element="O" mass="15.8994"/> <Type name="ow_s_1" class="ow" mass="0.1"/> <Type name="hw_1" class="hw_b" element="H" mass="1.0079"/> <Type name="hw_2" class="hw_b" element="H" mass="1.0079"/> <Type name="v3bw_1" class="v3bw" mass="0"/> </AtomTypes> <Residues> <Residue name="oxidane"> <Atom name="O_1" type="ow_1" charge="4.746470148925"/> <Atom name="ow_s_1" type="ow_s_1" charge="-4.930678614693"/> <Atom name="H_2" type="hw_1" charge="0.7119105092183"/> <Atom name="H_3" type="hw_2" charge="0.7119105092183"/> <Atom name="v3bw_4" type="v3bw_1" charge="-1.239612552669"/> <VirtualSite type="average3" siteName="v3bw_4" atomName1="H_3" atomName2="O_1" atomName3="H_2" weight1="0.32485007" weight2="0.35029986" weight3="0.32485007"/> <Bond atomName1="v3bw_4" atomName2="H_3"/> <Bond atomName1="v3bw_4" atomName2="O_1"/> <Bond atomName1="v3bw_4" atomName2="H_2"/> <Bond atomName1="O_1" atomName2="H_3"/> <Bond atomName1="O_1" atomName2="H_2"/> </Residue> </Residues> <HarmonicBondForce> <Bond class1="hw_b" class2="ow_b" k="479400.5112057" length="0.09618614386767"/> </HarmonicBondForce> <HarmonicAngleForce energy="0"> <Angle class1="hw_b" class2="ow_b" class3="hw_b" k="417.3907929471" angle="1.820270265578"/> </HarmonicAngleForce> <CustomAngleForce energy="0"/> <RBTorsionForce energy="0"/> <PeriodicTorsionForce energy="0"/> <CustomNonbondedForce energy="select(epsilon*sigma,(((2*epsilon)/(1-(3/(gamma+3)))) * (1.0/(1.0+(r/sigma)^6)) * ((3/(gamma+3))*exp(gamma*(1-(r/sigma)))-1)),0)" bondCutoff="0"> <GlobalParameter name="pot-WANG_BUCKINGHAM" defaultValue="1"/> <GlobalParameter name="pot-COULOMB_GAUSSIAN" defaultValue="1"/> <GlobalParameter name="cr-epsilon_HogervorstEpsilon" defaultValue="1"/> <GlobalParameter name="cr-gamma_MasonGamma" defaultValue="1"/> <GlobalParameter name="cr-sigma_InverseSquare" defaultValue="1"/> <GlobalParameter name="nexcl" defaultValue="2"/> <GlobalParameter name="prefactor-" defaultValue="1"/> <UseAttributeFromResidue name="charge"/> <PerParticleParameter name="sigma"/> <PerParticleParameter name="epsilon"/> <PerParticleParameter name="gamma"/> <PerParticleParameter name="charge"/> <PerParticleParameter name="zeta"/> <Atom type="hw_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0" gamma="1" zeta="0"/> <Atom type="hw_2" sigma="0" epsilon="0" gamma="1" zeta="0"/> <Atom type="ow_1" sigma="0.4071718471473" epsilon="2.041541722001" gamma="11.67586091974" zeta="0"/> <Atom type="ow_s_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0" gamma="1" zeta="16.30324079743"/> <Atom type="v3bw_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0" gamma="1" zeta="9.868603958008"/> </CustomNonbondedForce> <NonbondedForce coulomb14scale="1" lj14scale="1"> <UseAttributeFromResidue name="charge"/> <Atom type="hw_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0"/> <Atom type="hw_2" sigma="0" epsilon="0"/> <Atom type="ow_1" sigma="0.3627488766864" epsilon="2.041541722001"/> <Atom type="ow_s_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0"/> <Atom type="v3bw_1" sigma="0" epsilon="0"/> </NonbondedForce> <DrudeForce> <Particle type1="ow_s_1" type2="ow_1" polarizability="0.002726862139713" charge="-4.930678614693" thole="0"/> </DrudeForce> <Script>import openmm hyper_table = { # Drude Atom [ fchyper, rhyper ] ( "ow_s_1", "ow_1" ) : [ 4.26005e+09, 0 ] } atom_types = [data.atomType[atom] for atom in data.atoms] drude = next(f for f in sys.getForces() if isinstance(f, openmm.DrudeForce)) hyper = openmm.CustomBondForce("step(r-rhyper)*fchyper*(r-rhyper)^4") hyper.addPerBondParameter("fchyper") hyper.addPerBondParameter("rhyper") hyper.addGlobalParameter("pot-HyperPolarisation", 1) nhyper = 0 for i in range(drude.getNumParticles()): # p = (drude, parent, p2, p3, p4, q, alpha, a12, a34) p = drude.getParticleParameters(i) drude_parent = ( atom_types[p[0]], atom_types[p[1]] ) if drude_parent in hyper_table: hyper.addBond(p[0], p[1], hyper_table[drude_parent]) nhyper += 1 # Uncomment next two lines for debugging # else: # print(f"drude_parent {drude_parent} not found in ForceField") if nhyper > 0: sys.addForce(hyper) </Script> </ForceField>
